---
title: "Solutions Propriétaires"
date: today
date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
---

# Harnesses Propriétaires

## Claude Code (Anthropic)

| Caractéristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Éditeur | Anthropic |
| Modèle | Claude 4 Opus/Sonnet |
| Niveau autonomie | L3 |
| Licence | Propriétaire |
| Télémétrie | Activée par défaut |
| ZDR Enterprise | ✅ (plan Enterprise) |
| Training opt-out | ✅ (Enterprise) |

**Points forts** : Best-in-class reasoning, tool calling natif, terminal integration, multi-file edits, MCP support.

**Points faibles** : Télémétrie par défaut, coût (Claude Opus = $15/M input), pas de self-hosting.

```bash
# Installation
npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code

# Désactiver télémétrie
export CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_TELEMETRY=1
```

## Cursor

| Caractéristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Éditeur | Anysphere |
| Modèle | GPT-4o, Claude 4, Gemini 2.5 |
| Niveau autonomie | L2 |
| Licence | Propriétaire |
| Télémétrie | Activée par défaut |
| ZDR Enterprise | ✅ (Privacy Mode) |
| Training opt-out | ✅ (Privacy Mode) |

**Points forts** : IDE complet (fork VS Code), codebase indexing, multi-model, Composer (multi-file), Cursor Tab (autocomplétion).

**Points faibles** : Indexing envoie le code vers les serveurs, Privacy Mode payant.

## Windsurf (Codeium)

| Caractéristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Éditeur | Codeium |
| Modèle | Claude 4, GPT-4o, Gemini 2.5 |
| Niveau autonomie | L2 |
| Licence | Propriétaire |
| Télémétrie | ⚠️ Activée, pas d'opt-out clair |
| ZDR Enterprise | ⚠️ Partiel (exceptions: Remote Indexing, Memories, Recipes) |
| Training opt-out | ⚠️ Training sur prompts/outputs |

::: callout-warning
## Windsurf — Risque entreprise
Windsurf utilise les prompts/outputs pour le training sans opt-out clair. Le ZDR Enterprise a des exceptions (Remote Indexing, Memories, Recipes). **Non recommandé pour données sensibles sans contrat Enterprise négocié.**
:::

## GitHub Copilot

| Caractéristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Éditeur | GitHub/Microsoft |
| Modèle | GPT-4o, Claude 3.5 Sonnet |
| Niveau autonomie | L1-L2 |
| Licence | Propriétaire |
| Télémétrie | Activée par défaut |
| ZDR Enterprise | ✅ (Copilot Enterprise) |
| Training opt-out | ✅ (Enterprise) |

**Points forts** : Intégration GitHub native, support multi-IDE (VS Code, JetBrains, Neovim), Copilot Workspace, Copilot Agent.

**Points faibles** : Moins puissant que Claude Code/Cursor pour l'agentic, télémétrie par défaut.

## Tabnine

| Caractéristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Éditeur | Tabnine (Tel Aviv) |
| Modèle | Propriétaire + Llama |
| Niveau autonomie | L1 |
| Licence | Propriétaire |
| Télémétrie | Configurable |
| ZDR Enterprise | ✅ (Tabnine Enterprise) |
| Training opt-out | ✅ (Enterprise) |

**Points forts** : Focus privacy, modèle on-prem disponible, autocomplétion LLM.

**Points faibles** : L1 seulement, pas d'agent, moins performant que la concurrence.

## Devin (Cognition)

| Caractéristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Éditeur | Cognition Labs |
| Modèle | Propriétaire |
| Niveau autonomie | L4 |
| Licence | Propriétaire (SaaS) |
| Télémétrie | Activée |
| ZDR Enterprise | Non documenté |

**Points forts** : Premier "AI software engineer" fully-autonome, planning, terminal, browser.

**Points faibles** : Closed source, opaque, résultats mitigés en pratique, coût élevé.

## Outils découverts automatiquement

<!-- TOOLS_HARNESS_PROP_START -->
### [DeepSeek-Reasonix](https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix)
DeepSeek-native AI coding agent for your terminal. Engineered around prefix-cache stability — leave it running.

⭐ 26.7k | `Go` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-11
**Tags** : `agent`, `agent-framework`, `ai-agent`, `ai-coding`, `cli`, `coding-agent`, `deepseek`, `developer-tools`

### [code-review-graph](https://github.com/tirth8205/code-review-graph)
Local-first code intelligence graph for MCP and CLI. Builds a persistent map of your codebase so AI coding tools read only what matters, with benchmarked context reductions on reviews and large-rep...

⭐ 19.4k | `Python` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-11
**Tags** : `ai-coding`, `claude`, `claude-code`, `code-review`, `graphrag`, `incremental`, `knowledge-graph`, `llm`

### [bananas](https://github.com/mistweaverco/bananas)
Bananas🍌, Cross-Platform screen 🖥️ sharing 📡 made simple ⚡.

⭐ 6.2k | `Svelte` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-11
**Tags** : `cross-platform`, `multi-cursor`, `p2p`, `pair-programming`, `pairing`, `peer-to-peer`, `screensharing`

### [awesome-devteam](https://github.com/leehosung/awesome-devteam)
좋은 개발팀을 만드는데 도움이 되는 자료

⭐ 3.4k | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-08
**Tags** : `cto`, `devteam`, `pair-programming`

### [teleconsole](https://github.com/gravitational/teleconsole)
Command line tool to share your UNIX terminal and forward local TCP ports to people you trust.

⭐ 2.8k | `Go` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-06-15
**Tags** : `cli`, `collaboration`, `pair-programming`, `ssh`, `terminal-based`, `tools`, `tunnel`

### [live-share](https://github.com/microsoft/live-share)
Real-time collaborative development from the comfort of your favorite tools

⭐ 2.4k | Licence: CC-BY-4.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-11
**Tags** : `collaboration`, `pair-programming`, `visual-studio`, `visual-studio-code`

### [envd](https://github.com/tensorchord/envd)
🏕️ Reproducible development environment for humans and agents

⭐ 2.2k | `Go` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-09
**Tags** : `agent`, `buildkit`, `code-agent`, `codex`, `developer-tools`, `development-environment`, `docker`, `hacktoberfest`

### [claude-code-tools](https://github.com/pchalasani/claude-code-tools)
Practical productivity tools for Claude Code, Codex-CLI, and similar CLI coding agents.

⭐ 1.9k | `Python` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-11
**Tags** : `claude-code`, `cli`, `cli-agent`, `code-agent`, `codex`, `codex-cli`, `context`, `llm`

### [mob](https://github.com/remotemobprogramming/mob)
Tool for smooth git handover.

⭐ 1.8k | `Go` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-11
**Tags** : `cli`, `cli-tool`, `ensemble`, `ensemble-programming`, `ensembles`, `extreme-programming`, `git`, `go`

### [awesome-agile](https://github.com/lorabv/awesome-agile)
Awesome List of resources on Agile Software Development.

⭐ 1.5k | Licence: CC0-1.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-09
**Tags** : `a-b-testing`, `agile`, `agile-architecture`, `agile-development`, `agile-manifesto`, `awesome`, `awesome-list`, `backlog`

### [MyAgents](https://github.com/hAcKlyc/MyAgents)
MyAgents - 优雅、易用的 Agent 桌面端 ，一站式 Agent 工作台与任务中心

⭐ 841 | `TypeScript` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-10
**Tags** : `ai`, `ai-agents`, `claude-code`, `code-agent`, `desktop`, `manus`, `skills`

### [OpenSwarm](https://github.com/unohee/OpenSwarm)
OpenSwarm — Autonomous AI dev team orchestrator powered by Claude Code CLI. Discord control, Linear integration, cognitive memory.

⭐ 817 | `TypeScript` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-11
**Tags** : `ai-agents`, `ai-coding`, `autonomous-agents`, `claude`, `claude-code`, `devops`, `discord-bot`, `linear`

### [ai-maestro](https://github.com/23blocks-OS/ai-maestro)
AI Agent Orchestrator with Skills System - Give AI Agents superpowers: memory search, code graph queries, agent-to-agent messaging. Manage Claude, Codex or any AI Agent from one dashboard. Move Age...

⭐ 724 | `TypeScript` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-08
**Tags** : `agent-communication`, `agent-skills`, `agentic-ai`, `ai-agents`, `ai-coding-assistant`, `ai-memory`, `ai-orchestration`, `ai-workforce`

### [highly-skilled-job-offers](https://github.com/coditori/highly-skilled-job-offers)
Sharing some info around job offers and interviews preparations

⭐ 648 | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-03
**Tags** : `cv`, `immigration`, `interview`, `interview-questions`, `job`, `job-offers`, `jobsearch`, `jobseeker`

### [hopp](https://github.com/gethopp/hopp)
The best OSS remote pair programming app.

⭐ 615 | `Rust` | Licence: AGPL-3.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-10
**Tags** : `golang`, `multi-cursor`, `oss`, `pair-programming`, `remote-control`, `rust`, `screen-sharing`, `self-hosted`

### [code-on-incus](https://github.com/mensfeld/code-on-incus)
Give each AI agent its own isolated machine with root, Docker, and systemd. Active defense detects and stops threats automatically.

⭐ 586 | `Python` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-11
**Tags** : `agentic-ai`, `ai-tools`, `anthropic`, `claude`, `claude-code`, `cli`, `code-sandbox`, `coding-assistant`

### [RepoMaster](https://github.com/QuantaAlpha/RepoMaster)
RepoMaster: The open-source AI agent that masters GitHub. It turns any code repository into a powerful tool, achieving a new level of autonomous task-solving. An open alternative to Claude-Code.

⭐ 533 | `Python` | MAJ: 2026-07-07
**Tags** : `claude-code`, `code-agent`, `gittaskbench`, `mle-bench`, `openhands`, `swe-agent`

### [git-duet](https://github.com/git-duet/git-duet)
Support for pairing with git

⭐ 434 | `Shell` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-06-17
**Tags** : `command-line-tool`, `git`, `git-duet`, `go`, `hacktoberfest`, `pair-programming`, `pairing`

### [coro-code](https://github.com/Blushyes/coro-code)
Open-source CLI coding agent, a free alternative to Claude Code. Generate, debug, and manage code seamlessly.

⭐ 366 | `Rust` | MAJ: 2026-07-07
**Tags** : `agent`, `claude-code`, `cli`, `cli-agent`, `code-agent`, `gemini-cli`, `llm`

### [the-pair](https://github.com/timwuhaotian/the-pair)
Open-source AI pair programming for desktop: a Mentor + Executor agent cross-check each other's code to catch AI hallucinations. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Gemini & opencode. macOS / Windows / ...

⭐ 344 | `TypeScript` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-10
**Tags** : `ai`, `ai-agents`, `ai-code-review`, `claude-code`, `codex`, `codex-cli`, `developer-tools`, `gemini`

<!-- TOOLS_HARNESS_PROP_END -->
